summary: Release train counts the active drift-review feature + UNRELEASED test-passed bug mini-cycles; the active drift-review feature's live gate proof is validated against the CURRENT HEAD (where the re-stamp re-binds it), not the frozen implement->drift-review transition commit, so an on-top fix that grows+re-gates the change-set keeps the feature a valid member; released bugs excluded via git tag-reachability; bug-member provider injected as a delegate (Doti.Core->Cycle.Core layering preserved)
